error_signature: Method not allowed - please check you are using the right HTTP method
title: Microsoft Outlook node authentication error
symptom: Workflows using the Microsoft Outlook node intermittently fail with an authentication error stating 'Method not allowed - please check you are using the right HTTP method'. This occurs after switching credentials.
not_this_if: Error does not occur after switching credentials
root_cause: The Microsoft Outlook node may have issues with token or refresh handling, especially if credentials are recreated or switched frequently. This can lead to inconsistent authentication states, causing the node to fail with HTTP method errors.
fix_steps: Ensure the correct HTTP method is being used in the node settings
Test the workflow again after recreating credentials
agent_instruction: Recreate the Microsoft OAuth credentials and verify the HTTP method in the node settings.
